accurate.why: Accurately states it nullifies the RCCA; the described RCCA changes (definitions, sentencing, jury trial) are correct real-world context.

no_hallucinations.why: The added context about the RCCA's content is factually accurate.

states_purpose.why: States it nullifies the Revised Criminal Code Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the effect of nullifying the DC act.

effective_dates.why: No dates emphasized; not required at this altitude.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the operative effect plus context on the act being blocked.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
